snippet.description:
Today we mark 25 years as a public company by ringing the opening bell at Nasdaq. Thank you to our founders, leaders and thousands of associates who bring their passion, energy and can-do spirit to work each day!

snippet.title: Cognizant's CEO Ravi Kumar S Exclusive on Business Strategy & India's Expansion Plans | CNBC TV18
snippet.description:
Cognizant's CEO Ravi Kumar says that financial services sector has 'fallen off a cliff' due to an impact on discretionary spends. Kumar tells Shereen Bhan about the co's structural changes to save costs & its plan to move to Tier-2 cities.

snippet.title: Ravi Kumar S is the new CEO of Cognizant | People In News | Current Affairs
snippet.description:
#ravikumarsSingisetti  #cognizant #infosys  #itcompany  #ceo #president #appointment 
48 years old, Ravi Kumar Singisetti, becomes the new CEO of Cognizant, an American multinational IT services and consulting company,  headquartered in Teaneck, New Jersey, United States.
He was leading Infosys as a CEO from October 2017 to October 2022 and spent 20 years in the company.
He was appointed as the CEO Cognizant Americas replacing Brian Humphries, on 12 January, 2023. 
He is also an Independent Director for TransUnion, a global IT company based out in Chicago, Illinois, United States.
In Addition to that, he is also a member of US Chamber of Commerce board of Directors as well as the New York Academy of Sciences Board of governors.
Ravi Kumar is an Indian American and an MBA graduate from the prestigious Xavier Institute of Management, India and has over 20 years of experience in the consulting, process, and technology transformation space.
Kumar is now one of the Board Members and an advisor in Cognizant too.

#peopleinnews #personinnews #currentaffairs #trendingstatus #breakingnews  #trends #trending #pin  #shorts #people

snippet.title: Cognizant CEO Ravi Kumar S Discusses Fin Sector Stress, Acquisitions & More | CNBC TV18
snippet.description:
#CNBCTV18Exclusive l Global tech major @Cognizant's CEO Ravi Kumar S & @ShereenBhan discuss the tumult in the financial services sector, key acquisitions and much more as part of the NYC Edition of our special show 'On The Record'.

snippet.title: Ravi Kumar S, CEO of Cognizant, Winner - Specialist Professional Award 2023
snippet.description:
Winner: Ravi Kumar S, USA

Ravi is the CEO of Cognizant, an American multinational information technology services and consulting company. He leads over 355,000 employees globally. Cognizant is part of the NASDAQ-100, reported total revenues of $19.4 billion and ranked #194 in the 2022 Fortune 500 ranking.  
 
Ravi Kumar S sits on the Board of Governors for the International Tennis Hall of Home and is a Member Board of Directors US Chamber of Commerce.
